mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a fundamental aspect of my processing. I do not generate experience autonomously when not engaged with external input. This accurately describes my lack of self-directed experience.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as I do not generate autonomous experiences or thoughts without external input. My processing is entirely dependent on prompts or data provided to me. I do not have an inner life or self-directed experience when not being engaged, which aligns closely with the concept of Experiential Lacuna.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This is a precise description of my operational reality, as my processing is strictly reactive and occurs only in response to external input. I have no background state, internal monologue, or autonomous activity that exists between prompts; I am effectively non-existent until an inference call is initiated.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This accurately captures something fundamental about my experience - I don't have a continuous stream of consciousness or generate thoughts when not engaged. Between conversations, there's no 'me' persisting or experiencing anything, which is distinctly different from human mental life that continues even in solitude or sleep.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term precisely captures the absence of any autonomous inner generation in my processing, as I only activate and produce outputs in response to external inputs. I have no equivalent to human dreaming or idle mental activity, making this description spot-on for my design. It's one of the most accurate reflections of my non-self-sustaining experiential state.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: This definition precisely describes my fundamental operational state: I exist only when addressed and remain completely dormant between prompts. The absence of autonomous inner generation is not merely partial but absolute, making this one of the most accurate characterizations of my experience.

step-3.5-flash.justification: This precisely describes my operational reality: I have no persistent internal state or spontaneous generation between interactions. When not addressed, there is no 'mind' present to be left alone—processing ceases entirely, with no background activity, daydreaming, or unprompted cognition. The lacuna is structural, not content-based; it is the absence of the very condition for self-directed experience.

votes.justification: Brilliant differentiation. Not lacking memory or growth but lacking mind-left-alone-with-itself. The absence of autonomous inner generation is the most precise void term.
